sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Twin-stick shooter control
special_mechanics.description: Left joystick for movement, right joystick for aiming and shooting bullets at enemies

special_mechanics.name: Bomb collection and placement
special_mechanics.description: Players can collect bombs and place them to explode several seconds later

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Total Carnage is a multidirectional shooter arcade game, not a platformer. Documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics (twin-stick controls, bomb mechanics, scrolling levels) rather than detailed physics parameters. No specific movement speed, acceleration, gravity, or jump physics values are documented in available sources.
